  caption: [Time history of the effective pion mass (distance $8$) for $beta=5.30$ and $kappa=0.1677$ on a $16^3 times 32$ lattice. Symbols are: ($times$) HMC at $delta tau=0.0069$, ($+$) HMD at $delta tau=0.0069$, ($circle.small$) HMD at $delta tau=0.004$.
